creator: yuko@veltec.co.jp
text:
socket.2 is 
	SOCK_RDM        Sequenced packet stream,
	SOCK_SEQPACKET  Reliably-delivered packet

	src/sys/sys/socket.h is
	(* $FreeBSD: src/sys/sys/socket.h,v 1.49 2001/02/17 03:49:24 bde Exp $)
	#define SOCK_RDM        4               /* reliably-delivered message */	#define SOCK_SEQPACKET  5               /* sequenced packet stream */
	It is reverse.
	Doesn't it correct by patch?

Fix: % diff -u /usr/share/man/man2 socket.2
How-To-Repeat: 
	Do "man 2 socket.2".
